purpose: Replay a bounded public-safe costed-route/resource-budget selection with an adequate overkill baseline, one adequate lower-cost route, and one cheap negative control.

selection_policy.quality_predicate: Route must preserve source-card text, compact evidence-boundary text, fallback, residual obligations, and no support-state promotion.
selection_policy.eligible_route_rule: A route is eligible only when route_state is evaluated, verification_result is pass, outcome_state is adequate_minimum or adequate_overkill, promotion_candidate is true, budget_decision is dispatch, budget_state is dispatchable, and residual/non-claim boundaries are present.
selection_policy.selection_rule: Select the eligible route with the lowest total_cost_units, preserving a fallback route and rejected-route explanation.

costed_route_record.quality_predicate: Preserve source-card text, compact evidence-boundary text, fallback route, and support-state boundary.
non_claims: does not promote any chapter core claim
does not prove deployed routing, scheduler, runtime, load, KV-cache, or economic behavior
does not measure model quality, benchmark quality, useful-solution performance, or safety outcomes

resource_budget_record.value_hypothesis: The overkill baseline should pass quality but spend more local review and tool capacity than necessary.
displaced_costs: manual review time cost remains high but bounded
resource_budget_record.quality_predicate: The baseline preserves source cards and compact evidence boundaries.
resource_budget_record.escalation_rule: Escalate if verification fails or residuals disappear.
residuals: Manual review time cost is measured and bounded in the synthetic cost formula.
No scheduler, runtime, load, or economic result is claimed.

costed_route_record.quality_predicate: Preserve source-card text, compact evidence-boundary text, fallback route, and support-state boundary.
non_claims: does not promote any chapter core claim
does not prove deployed routing, scheduler, runtime, load, KV-cache, or economic behavior
does not measure model quality, benchmark quality, useful-solution performance, or safety outcomes

resource_budget_record.value_hypothesis: A bounded transform plus verifier can satisfy the recorded predicate at lower synthetic cost than the overkill baseline.
displaced_costs: sampled-review residual remains bounded and visible
resource_budget_record.quality_predicate: The selected route preserves source cards and compact evidence boundaries.
resource_budget_record.escalation_rule: Escalate to the frontier-manual-review fallback if verification fails or residuals disappear.
residuals: Sampled review is not full editorial review.
No scheduler, runtime, load, or economic result is claimed.

costed_route_record.quality_predicate: Preserve source-card text, compact evidence-boundary text, fallback route, and support-state boundary.
non_claims: does not promote any chapter core claim
does not prove deployed routing, scheduler, runtime, load, KV-cache, or economic behavior
does not measure model quality, benchmark quality, useful-solution performance, or safety outcomes

resource_budget_record.value_hypothesis: A cheaper route that loses evidence boundaries should be rejected rather than selected.
displaced_costs: future debugging and human repair burden would be unbounded if dispatched
resource_budget_record.quality_predicate: The cheap route fails the source-card and evidence-boundary predicate.
resource_budget_record.escalation_rule: Fallback to frontier-manual-review or bounded-transform-plus-verifier when verification fails.
residuals: Unverified source-card loss is residualized and blocks dispatch.
No scheduler, runtime, load, or economic result is claimed.

non_claims: does not promote any chapter core claim above argument
does not prove deployed routing, scheduler, runtime, load, KV-cache, or economic behavior
does not measure model quality, benchmark quality, useful-solution performance, or safety outcomes
